transcript: Speaker A: Salary 12,000, aani kharch 11,990. Urlele paise itke kami ki swatah sathi kahich karu shakat nahi. Hee gosht aahe Rahul chi, Nashik cha mulga, vay 24. Data entry chi job, salary 12,000. Rozcha routine: office, ghar, reels, zop. Swapna hoti, pan English yet navhta. Ekda MNC interview mila. Interviewer mhanala, "Tell me about yourself." Rahul completely blank. 30 second silence. Mag kasabasa mhanala, "Sir, mi Rahul aahe, mi kaam karto." Interviewer hasla, "Thank you." Call kadhich aala nahi. Tya ratri reels scroll karat hota, tevdhyat MySivi app disla. Trial - fakt ek rupaya. Vichar kela, ek rupayat kay janar? Pahilyach divshi basic shikla, "How to introduce yourself." Sagla itka sopa vatla ki vatla, "He mi pan karu shakto!" Tya divsa pasun reels aivaji roz 15 minute MySivi var practice. AI teacher sobat bolayla lagla. Chuka kelya, lagech correct. 100 vela chukla, 100 vela sudharla. Kadhich judge nahi kela. Ek mahina gela, punha interview dila. "Tell me about yourself." "Good morning sir, my name is Rahul. I have experience in data entry..." Confidence full, select! Salary 28,000. Kay badalla? Fakt rozche 15 minute, je adhi reels madhe waste hot hote. Jar tumhalahi English madhe better vhaycha asel tar, aajach MySivi app download kara aani fakt ek rupaya madhe practice suru kara. [Speaker A: Salary 12,000, and expenses 11,990. The remaining money is so little that he can't do anything for himself. This is the story of Rahul, a 24-year-old boy from Nashik. Data entry job, salary 12,000. Daily routine: office, home, reels, sleep. He had dreams, but didn't know English. Once he got an MNC interview. The interviewer said, "Tell me about yourself." Rahul went completely blank. 30 seconds of silence. Then he somehow said, "Sir, I am Rahul, I work." The interviewer laughed, "Thank you." The call never came. That night he was scrolling reels, when he saw the MySivi app. Trial - only 1 rupee. He thought, what is there to lose in 1 rupee? On the very first day, he learnt the basics of "How to introduce yourself." It felt so easy that he thought, "I can do this too!" From that day, instead of reels, he practiced 15 minutes daily on MySivi. He started speaking with the AI teacher. He made mistakes, and got corrected instantly. He made mistakes 100 times, and corrected them 100 times. It never judged him. A month passed, and he gave an interview again. "Tell me about yourself." "Good morning sir, my name is Rahul. I have experience in data entry..." Full confidence, selected! Salary 28,000. What changed? Just 15 minutes daily, which were earlier wasted on reels. If you also want to get better at English, download the MySivi app today and start practicing for just 1 rupee.]
on_screen_text: Salary 12 हजार [Salary 12 thousand], आणि खर्च 11 हजार 990 [and expenses 11 thousand 990], उरलेले पैसे इतके कमी [remaining money so little], की स्वतःसाठी काहीच करू शकत नाही [that can't do anything for oneself], ही गोष्ट आहे राहुलची [This is the story of Rahul], नाशिकचा मुलगा [boy from Nashik], वय 24 [age 24], Data entry ची job [Data entry job], Salary - 12 हजार [Salary - 12 thousand], रोजचं routine [daily routine], office [office], घर [home], reels [reels], झोप [sleep], स्वप्नं होती [had dreams], पण English येत नव्हतं [but didn't know English], एकदा MNC interview [Once MNC interview], "Tell me about yourself.", Rahul completely blank, 30 सेकंद silence [30 seconds silence], - "Sir, मी राहुल आहे... मी काम करतो" [- "Sir, I am Rahul... I work"], Interviewer हसला [Interviewer laughed], "Thank you", कॉल कधीच आला नाही [Call never came], त्या रात्री reels [That night reels], scroll करत होता [was scrolling], तेवढ्यात MySivi [meanwhile MySivi], app दिसलं [app appeared], Trial - फक्त ₹1 [Trial - only ₹1], विचार केला - "1 [thought - "1], रुपयात काय जाणार?" [rupee what will go?"], पहिल्याच दिवशी [On the very first day], basic शिकला [learnt basic], "How to introduce yourself", सगळं इतकं सोपं [everything so easy], वाटलं की वाटलं - "हे [felt that - "this], मी पण करू शकतो!" [I can also do!"], त्या दिवसापासून [From that day], - reels ऐवजी [- instead of reels], रोज 15 मिनिटं [daily 15 minutes], MySivi वर practice [practice on MySivi], AI teacher सोबत [with AI teacher], बोलायला लागला [started speaking], चुका केल्या - [made mistakes -], लगेच correct [immediately correct], 100 वेळा चुकला [made mistake 100 times], - 100 वेळा सुधारलं [- corrected 100 times], कधी judge नाही [never judged], केलं [did], एक महिना गेला... [one month passed...], पुन्हा interview [again interview], दिला [gave], "Tell me about yourself.", "Good morning sir, My name is Rahul, I have experience in data entry...", Confidence full, select, Salary - 28 हजार [Salary - 28 thousand], काय बदललं? [What changed?], फक्त रोजचे 15 [only daily 15], मिनिटं [minutes], जे आधी reels मध्ये [which earlier in reels], waste होत होते [were being wasted], जर तुम्हालाही [If you also], English मध्ये [in English], better व्हायचं [want to get better], असेल तर... आजच MySivi [then... today itself MySivi], app download करा [download app], आणि फक्त [and only], ₹1 मध्ये [in ₹1], practice सुरू करा [start practice]
summary: Rahul, a low-earning data entry worker, gets rejected in an MNC interview due to poor English. He starts practicing 15 minutes daily on the MySivi app with an AI teacher for just 1 rupee. Within a month, he clears his next interview with confidence and secures a higher-paying job.
